childNodes.textContent: body { font-family: sans-serif; max-width: 600px; margin: 40px auto; padding: 0px 20px; }.section { margin: 24px 0px; padding: 16px; border: 1px solid rgb(221, 221, 221); border-radius: 8px; }button { padding: 8px 16px; margin: 4px; cursor: pointer; }input, textarea { padding: 8px; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; margin: 4px 0px; }#controls { position: fixed; top: 0px; left: 0px; right: 0px; background: rgb(17, 17, 17); color: rgb(255, 255, 255); padding: 12px 20px; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; z-index: 999; }#event-count { font-family: monospace; }.tall { height: 800px; background: linear-gradient(rgb(240, 240, 240), rgb(255, 255, 255)); padding: 20px; }
Scroll down through this tall section to generate scroll events
